title: Femboy Things
description: A rather simple mccreator Mod that adds a bit of femboy things to minecraft
body:
### Femboy things is a mod that adds..
Well Femboy Things as the name implies! 

Being fairly honest i put more work into thinking about what to add then making it.

I had the idea for a few years but started working on it in Early September (2025) after i got reminded of it from my friend. 

This isnt a great mod, I can say that for sure.
